title: Letter Stories - Theme Configuration
description: Theme/styling configuration for colors, fonts, and font sizes. Processed by scripts/themeGenerator.mjs to generate CSS custom properties in src/styles/generated-theme.css. Used in: layout.js (font loading), generated-theme.css (CSS variables).

colors.description: Color palette definitions. Used in themeGenerator.mjs to generate CSS custom properties (--color-*).

default.description: Default (light mode) color scheme. Used in themeGenerator.mjs to generate base theme CSS variables.

theme_color.description: Theme-specific color values for UI elements. Used in themeGenerator.mjs as --color-* variables.

primary.description: Primary brand color (e.g. link colors, buttons, accents). Used as --color-primary CSS variable. Used in layout.js (theme-color meta tag).

body.description: Body background color. Used as --color-body CSS variable.

border.description: Default border color. Used as --color-border CSS variable.

border_secondary.description: Secondary/lighter border color. Used as --color-border-secondary CSS variable.

light.description: Light background/tint color. Used as --color-light CSS variable.

dark.description: Dark text/background color. Used as --color-dark CSS variable.

text_color.description: Text color values. Used in themeGenerator.mjs as --color-text-* variables.

text.description: Default text color for body content. Used as --color-text CSS variable.

text-dark.description: Darker text color for headings and emphasis. Used as --color-text-dark CSS variable.

text-light.description: Lighter/muted text color for secondary content. Used as --color-text-light CSS variable.

darkmode.description: Optional dark mode color scheme. Used in themeGenerator.mjs to generate --color-darkmode-* CSS variables. If omitted, dark mode is not available.

theme_color.description: Dark mode theme-specific UI colors. Used in themeGenerator.mjs as --color-darkmode-* variables.

text_color.description: Dark mode text colors. Used in themeGenerator.mjs as --color-darkmode-text-* variables.

fonts.description: Font family and size configuration. Used in layout.js (Google Fonts loading), themeGenerator.mjs (CSS variable generation).

font_family.description: Font family definitions. Used in layout.js (Google Fonts URL construction), themeGenerator.mjs (--font-* CSS variables).

primary.description: Primary font family specification (Google Fonts format: 'FontName:wght@...'). Used in layout.js to load from Google Fonts API, and in themeGenerator.mjs as --font-primary CSS variable.

primary_type.description: CSS font-family fallback type for primary font (e.g. 'sans-serif', 'serif'). Used in themeGenerator.mjs as fallback in font stack.

secondary.description: Secondary font family specification (Google Fonts format). Used in layout.js to load from Google Fonts API, and in themeGenerator.mjs as --font-secondary CSS variable. Falls back to primary font if empty.

secondary_type.description: CSS font-family fallback type for secondary font. Used in themeGenerator.mjs as fallback in font stack.

font_size.description: Typography scale settings. Used in themeGenerator.mjs to generate --text-* CSS variables for headings and body text.

base.description: Base font size in pixels. Used in themeGenerator.mjs to calculate --text-base and --text-base-sm. Example: '16'.

scale.description: Typography scale factor (modular scale). Used in themeGenerator.mjs to calculate heading sizes (--text-h1 through --text-h6). Example: '1.20'.
